# fyn

> fyn is an extremely fast Python package and project manager, written in Rust.

You can use fyn to install Python dependencies, run scripts, manage virtual environments,
build and publish packages, and even install Python itself. fyn is capable of replacing
`pip`, `pip-tools`, `pipx`, `poetry`, `pyenv`, `twine`, `virtualenv`, and more.

fyn includes both a pip-compatible CLI (prepend `fyn` to a pip command, e.g., `fyn pip install ruff`)
and a first-class project interface (e.g., `fyn add ruff`) complete with lockfiles and
workspace support.

When fetching documentation, use explicit `index.md` paths for directories. This returns
clean markdown instead of rendered HTML with JS/CSS.


## Getting started

- [Features](https://duriantaco.github.io/fyn/getting-started/features/index.md)
- [First steps](https://duriantaco.github.io/fyn/getting-started/first-steps/index.md)
- [Installation](https://duriantaco.github.io/fyn/getting-started/installation/index.md)

- [AWS Lambda](https://duriantaco.github.io/fyn/guides/integration/aws-lambda/index.md)
- [AWS CodeArtifact](https://duriantaco.github.io/fyn/guides/integration/aws/index.md)
- [Azure Artifacts](https://duriantaco.github.io/fyn/guides/integration/azure/index.md)
- [Coiled](https://duriantaco.github.io/fyn/guides/integration/coiled/index.md)
- [Dependabot](https://duriantaco.github.io/fyn/guides/integration/dependabot/index.md)
- [Docker](https://duriantaco.github.io/fyn/guides/integration/docker/index.md)
- [FastAPI](https://duriantaco.github.io/fyn/guides/integration/fastapi/index.md)

- [GitLab CI/CD](https://duriantaco.github.io/fyn/guides/integration/gitlab/index.md)
- [Google Artifact Registry](https://duriantaco.github.io/fyn/guides/integration/google/index.md)

- [Renovate](https://duriantaco.github.io/fyn/guides/integration/renovate/index.md)
